title: Do Effects of Medicare ACOs Spill Over to Commercial Patients?
source: U-Michigan CEHR, School of Public Health

L2: Visual abstract on Medicare ACO spillover effects to commercial patients
Physician participation in Medicare Accountable Care Organizations and impact on commercial spending
L3: U-Michigan CEHR visual abstract examining whether physician participation in Medicare Accountable Care Organizations produces spillover effects in commercial patient spending. Evaluates cross-payer impact of ACO participation.
